channel.title: HoldLens — What to sell (Q4 2025)
channel.description: Top sell signals from the best portfolio managers in the world — ranked on a single signed −100..+100 ConvictionScore where −100 is the strongest possible sell. Updated every 13F filing deadline.

item.title: AAPL SELL signal · score −20 on a −100..+100 scale
item.description: John Armitage, Warren Buffett, Polen Capital, David Rolfe are selling AAPL (Apple Inc.) this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: −20 (negative = sell, positive = buy). Quality-weighted seller list: John Armitage (Q4.9), Warren Buffett (Q5.9), Polen Capital (Q5.6), David Rolfe (Q4.8).

item.title: GOOGL SELL signal · score −9 on a −100..+100 scale
item.description: Terry Smith, Polen Capital, Bill Ackman are selling GOOGL (Alphabet) this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: −9 (negative = sell, positive = buy). Quality-weighted seller list: Terry Smith (Q5.8), Polen Capital (Q5.6), Bill Ackman (Q5.1).

item.title: LLY SELL signal · score −9 on a −100..+100 scale
item.description: Polen Capital is selling LLY (Eli Lilly) this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: −9 (negative = sell, positive = buy). Quality-weighted seller list: Polen Capital (Q5.6).

item.title: COF SELL signal · score −6 on a −100..+100 scale
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller, Andreas Halvorsen, Stephen Mandel, Lee Ainslie are selling COF (Capital One Financial) this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: −6 (negative = sell, positive = buy). Quality-weighted seller list: Stanley Druckenmiller (Q7.2), Andreas Halvorsen (Q4.2), Stephen Mandel (Q2.5), Lee Ainslie (Q1).

item.title: SIRI SELL signal · score −4 on a −100..+100 scale
item.description: Joel Greenblatt is selling SIRI (SIRI) this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: −4 (negative = sell, positive = buy). Quality-weighted seller list: Joel Greenblatt (Q2.2).

item.description: Tom Slater is selling TSLA (Tesla) this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: −4 (negative = sell, positive = buy). Quality-weighted seller list: Tom Slater (Q4.8).

item.description: Warren Buffett, Joel Greenblatt are selling POOL (POOL) this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: −4 (negative = sell, positive = buy). Quality-weighted seller list: Warren Buffett (Q5.9), Joel Greenblatt (Q2.2).

item.title: FIS SELL signal · score −3 on a −100..+100 scale
item.description: FIS (Fidelity National Info) carries a strong historical sell signal even without fresh activity this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: −3 (negative = sell, positive = buy). Score reflects historical dissent, crowding, and trend deterioration.

item.description: Polen Capital, Joel Greenblatt are selling KO (Coca-Cola) this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: −3 (negative = sell, positive = buy). Quality-weighted seller list: Polen Capital (Q5.6), Joel Greenblatt (Q2.2).
